# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_TARGETS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of deployment targets')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_TYPE', defaultValue: 'jar', description: 'Type of artifact to download')
    }
    environment {
        ARTIFACT_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        DEPLOY_DIR = "/opt/deployments"
    }
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.ARTIFACT_URLS == null || params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim() == '') {
                        error "ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required"
                    }
                    if (params.DEPLOY_TARGETS == null || params.DEPLOY_TARGETS.trim() == '') {
                        error "DEPLOY_TARGETS parameter is required"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Prepare Directories') {
            steps {
                sh 'mkdir -p ${ARTIFACT_DIR}'
                sh 'mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR}'
            }
        }
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',')
                    def artifacts = []
                    
                    for (url in urls) {
                        def cleanUrl = url.trim()
                        if (cleanUrl != '') {
                            def fileName = cleanUrl.tokenize('/')[-1]
                            def artifactPath = "${ARTIFACT_DIR}/${fileName}"
                            
                            // Validate URL scheme
                            if (!(cleanUrl.startsWith('http://') || cleanUrl.startsWith('https://'))) {
                                error "Invalid URL scheme for ${cleanUrl}"
                            }
                            
                            // Download with security checks
                            sh """
                                curl -f -L --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 \\
                                    -H 'User-Agent: Jenkins-Deployment-Agent' \\
                                    -o '${artifactPath}' '${cleanUrl}'
                            """
                            
                            artifacts << [url: cleanUrl, path: artifactPath, name: fileName]
                        }
                    }
                    
                    // Store artifacts for later use
                    env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACTS = artifacts.toString()
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def targets = params.DEPLOY_TARGETS.split(',')
                    def artifacts = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper().parseText(env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACTS)
                    
                    for (target in targets) {
                        def cleanTarget = target.trim()
                        if (cleanTarget != '') {
                            // Validate target format
                            if (cleanTarget.contains(':')) {
                                def host = cleanTarget.split(':')[0]
                                def port = cleanTarget.split(':')[1]
                                if (port != null && !port.matches(/^\d+$/)) {
                                    error "Invalid port number in target ${cleanTarget}"
                                }
                            }
                            
                            for (artifact in artifacts) {
                                def deployPath = "${DEPLOY_DIR}/${artifact.name}"
                                
                                // Secure deployment using SSH
                                sh """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \\
                                        -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null \\
                                        ${cleanTarget} \\
                                        "mkdir -p ${DEPLOY_DIR} && \\
                                        sudo cp ${artifact.path} ${deployPath} && \\
                                        sudo chown -R deploy:deploy ${deployPath}"
                                """
                                
                                echo "Successfully deployed ${artifact.name} to ${cleanTarget}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Deployment failed"
        }
    }
}
